---
title: "🏡 House Valuation Report"
output: pagedown::html_paged
params:
  predicted_price: NA
  new_price: NA
  renovation_text: NA
  roi: NA
---

## Property Valuation Summary

**Predicted Sale Price:** $`r format(round(params$predicted_price, 2), big.mark = ",")`

---

## Renovation Recommendations

`r params$renovation_text`

---

## ROI Analysis

**Estimated Price After Renovation:** $`r format(round(params$new_price, 2), big.mark = ",")`

**Total Estimated ROI Gain:** `r paste0(round(params$roi * 100, 1), "%")`

---

*Report generated by HousePredX — AI-Powered Home Valuation App*
